calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Reconsideration Of Order Denying Petition For Writ
Off Calendar Oct-25-2012 Denied

Mtn For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate; Opening Brief
Off Calendar Sep-20-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
David Lanferman, Esq. and Alexander Merritt, Esq., of Sheppard Mullin, Tel. 415.434.9100, for Plaintiff and moving party;
Robert E. Asperger, Esq., Office of Atty General, Tel. 916.327.7852, for defendant and opposing party;
Philip G. Wyels, Esq., Asst Chief Counsel, SWRCB, Tel. 916.341.5178, for Defendant and opposing party.

The matter was argued. After hearing, PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BUILDING INDUSTRY ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate WAS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. Each party to submit a proposed order by email to the court. Judge: Curtis E. A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR # 7077

(AFTER HEARING, PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA BUILDING INDUSTRY ASSOCIATION'S Motion For Issuance Of Writ Of Mandate is Denied. Order signed. Respondent Board to give notice of the order.)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-26-2012 Off Calendar
